question.label: Energy read
question.name: What's been giving you energy lately?
question.description: Strengths-based, not scoped to work. Reveals what genuinely animates the person.

assessment.note: Helping others is a positive engagement and wellbeing signal, showing motivation and energy from supporting peers.

new_queue.label: Current focus
new_queue.name: How has the last couple of weeks felt from your side?

new_queue.label: Team dynamics
new_queue.name: How are you feeling about the current team dynamics?

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?

new_queue.label: Feedback received
new_queue.name: How has recent feedback you've received landed with you?

new_queue.label: Role expectations
new_queue.name: What parts of your role feel unclear or misaligned right now?

new_queue.label: Support needs
new_queue.name: What support do you feel you need from me to succeed?

new_queue.label: Skill development
new_queue.name: What new skills or areas are you interested in developing?

new_queue.label: Team contribution
new_queue.name: What do you feel has been your biggest contribution to the team lately?
